Meta.title: Notkode — Custom AI-powered technology
Meta.description: AI-powered internal systems, intelligent agents, automations and custom digital products. Development for companies and agencies.

Nav.agentesAutomacaoDesc: Chatbots, virtual assistants and n8n integrations
Nav.sitesDesc: Institutional sites, landing pages and blogs with live pricing.
Nav.ecommerceDesc: Online store built to convert: catalog to checkout.
Nav.brandbookDesc: Logo, palette, typography and complete brandbook.

Home.heroDescription: AI systems, websites, e-commerce, agents and brand identity. Custom-built, at the standard your business demands.
Home.showcaseDesc: Centralize CRM, automation, AI and dashboards in a single solution built around your process.
Home.feature1Desc: Made for the way you work, not adapted from a generic template.
Home.feature2Desc: An intelligent assistant trained on your data, clients and processes.
Home.feature3Desc: No platform subscription. It's your code, on your server.
Home.feature4Desc: Start small and expand without rebuilding from scratch.
Home.caseProblem: Traditional company with years in the market, 100% manual operation in spreadsheets, email and phone. No data was connected; every follow-up depended on the team's memory.
Home.caseSolution: Internal system with auditable pipeline, AI that analyzes lost leads and writes the next email in the company's tone, new website connected to the system and paid traffic integrated into the funnel.
Home.servicesDesc: AI systems, websites, e-commerce, agents and brand identity. You pick what you need, we deliver at standard.
Home.serviceSistemasDesc: A custom internal system that replaces your CRM, ERP, spreadsheets and scattered WhatsApp.
Home.serviceAgentesDesc: We connect your tools and automate what your team does manually today. Billing, follow-up, qualification, spreadsheets, email.
Home.serviceSitesDesc: Institutional sites, landing pages and blogs. From brief to live in a few weeks.
Home.serviceEcommerceDesc: A custom store or orchestration of the one you already have, without bleeding on platform fees.
Home.serviceBrandbookDesc: Logo, palette, typography and applications. Enough for your brand to run consistently.
Home.processDesc: A simple process that takes your idea from paper to reality.
Home.process1Desc: We understand how you work today and where technology makes the most difference.
Home.process2Desc: We choose the right solution and map the fastest path to results.
Home.process3Desc: You track progress every week and watch the product take shape.
Home.process4Desc: We launch together and keep evolving based on what the data shows.
Home.testimonialsTitle: Stories from those who built with Notkode.
Home.testimonial1Quote: Notkode was essential for the rapid launch of my project. From the first contact, I received exceptional attention, in negotiation, during the project and at delivery. Highest quality, technique, agility and seriousness. Highly recommend!
Home.testimonial3Quote: Everything was very professional and we were able to quickly transform ideas into reality. I am very happy with the result.
Home.testimonial4Quote: Very attentive service, always with logical and efficient counterpoints. The project was delivered on time and the quality was perfect. I recommend with full confidence.
Home.agencyTitle: Multiply your revenue with white-label dev
Home.agencyDesc: Offer development and AI to your clients without hiring a team. Notkode works behind the scenes.
Home.finalCtaTitle: Let's build what your business needs.
Home.finalCtaDesc: Pick the service, fill out the form in 3 minutes and get your proposal.
